prompt: A premium building fascia sign on a modern charcoal rendered building facade at dusk golden hour. The sign features large brushed stainless steel letters L and K in a thin elegant sans-serif typeface like Futura Light, with delicate slim strokes. A tiny gold square detail sits between the L and K. Below, very small brushed metal letters read DESIGN AND BUILD in widely-spaced thin sans-serif. Beneath that, smaller text reads 0481 742 026 and lkdesignandbuild.com.au. The thin elegant letterforms are mounted with standoff pins creating subtle LED backlighting against the dark facade. The minimalism of the design is striking against the building. Golden hour light catches the slim metal letterforms. Modern commercial building exterior, architectural photography.
negative_prompt: cheap signage, vinyl banner, pixelated, low quality, daytime flat lighting, ugly building, run-down, dirty, cluttered, cartoon, illustration, bold heavy letters, ornate, decorative

settings.lighting: golden hour dusk with LED backlighting
settings.camera_angle: slight low angle looking up at signage
